---
format:
  html:
    toc: false
    anchor-sections: false
---

```{=html}
<script>
  (function () {
    if (window.location.hostname.endsWith("github.io") && window.location.pathname === "/crrow") {
      window.location.replace("/crrow/");
    }
  })();
</script>

<div class="rp-home">
  <div class="rp-shell">
    <p class="rp-prompt"><span class="rp-typewriter">~/portfolio ❯ cat projects.json</span></p>
    <pre class="rp-ascii" aria-label="crrow">
 ____ ____ ____   ___   _    _
/ ___|  _ \  _ \ / _ \ | |  | |
| |   | |_) | |_) | | | || |  | |
| |___|  _ <|  _ <| |_| || |__| |
\____|_| \_\_| \_\\___/  \____/
    </pre>

    <div class="rp-tagline-row">
      <span class="rp-tagline">Shipping weird things that somehow work.</span>
      <span class="rp-cursor" aria-hidden="true">█</span>
      <a class="rp-blog-link" href="./posts/index.html">open blog →</a>
    </div>

    <section class="rp-grid" aria-label="Projects">
      <a class="rp-card" style="--i: 0" href="https://crrow.github.io/crrow/" target="_blank" rel="noreferrer">
        <div class="rp-card-head">
          <h3 class="rp-card-title">crrow blog infra</h3>
          <span class="rp-arrow">→</span>
        </div>
        <span class="rp-lang">TypeScript</span>
        <p class="rp-desc">A fast static blog pipeline and publishing flow focused on writing speed and clean output.</p>
        <div class="rp-tags">
          <span class="rp-tag">next</span>
          <span class="rp-tag">writing</span>
          <span class="rp-tag">static</span>
        </div>
      </a>

      <a class="rp-card" style="--i: 1" href="https://github.com/rararulab" target="_blank" rel="noreferrer">
        <div class="rp-card-head">
          <h3 class="rp-card-title">rararulab</h3>
          <span class="rp-arrow">→</span>
        </div>
        <span class="rp-lang">Rust</span>
        <p class="rp-desc">Experiments around infra tooling, distributed systems, and practical systems programming.</p>
        <div class="rp-tags">
          <span class="rp-tag">rust</span>
          <span class="rp-tag">infra</span>
          <span class="rp-tag">systems</span>
        </div>
      </a>

      <a class="rp-card" style="--i: 2" href="./posts/index.html">
        <div class="rp-card-head">
          <h3 class="rp-card-title">local network notes</h3>
          <span class="rp-arrow">→</span>
        </div>
        <span class="rp-lang">Markdown</span>
        <p class="rp-desc">A series of network and homelab writeups with practical setup guides and pitfalls.</p>
        <div class="rp-tags">
          <span class="rp-tag">network</span>
          <span class="rp-tag">homelab</span>
          <span class="rp-tag">notes</span>
        </div>
      </a>
    </section>

    <footer class="rp-status">
      <span class="rp-status-left">
        <span class="rp-dot" aria-hidden="true"></span>
        <span class="rp-status-text">available for work</span>
      </span>
      <a class="rp-github" href="https://github.com/crrow" target="_blank" rel="noreferrer">github</a>
    </footer>
  </div>
</div>

<style>
  @import url("https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=JetBrains+Mono:wght@400;500;700&display=swap");

  body.quarto-dark .rp-home {
    --rp-base: #191724;
    --rp-surface: #1f1d2e;
    --rp-overlay: #26233a;
    --rp-muted: #6e6a86;
    --rp-subtle: #908caa;
    --rp-text: #e0def4;
    --rp-love: #eb6f92;
    --rp-gold: #f6c177;
    --rp-rose: #ebbcba;
    --rp-pine: #31748f;
    --rp-foam: #9ccfd8;
    --rp-iris: #c4a7e7;
    --rp-hl-low: #21202e;
    --rp-hl-med: #403d52;
  }

  body.quarto-light .rp-home {
    --rp-base: #faf4ed;
    --rp-surface: #fffaf3;
    --rp-overlay: #f2e9e1;
    --rp-muted: #9893a5;
    --rp-subtle: #797593;
    --rp-text: #575279;
    --rp-love: #b4637a;
    --rp-gold: #ea9d34;
    --rp-rose: #d7827e;
    --rp-pine: #286983;
    --rp-foam: #56949f;
    --rp-iris: #907aa9;
    --rp-hl-low: #f4ede8;
    --rp-hl-med: #dfdad9;
  }

  .rp-home,
  .rp-home * {
    font-family: "JetBrains Mono", monospace;
  }

  html,
  body {
    overflow-x: hidden;
  }

  #quarto-content {
    min-height: calc(100vh - 77px) !important;
    height: calc(100vh - 77px);
    overflow: hidden;
  }

  main.content {
    height: 100%;
    padding-top: 0 !important;
    padding-bottom: 0 !important;
  }

  .rp-home {
    height: 100%;
    color: var(--rp-text);
  }

  .rp-shell {
    width: 100%;
    max-width: 1100px;
    min-height: 100%;
    margin: 0 auto;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    padding-top: 10px;
  }

  .rp-prompt {
    margin: 0 0 12px;
    font-size: 12px;
    color: var(--rp-muted);
  }

  .rp-typewriter {
    display: inline-block;
    overflow: hidden;
    white-space: nowrap;
    width: 0;
    animation: rp-typewriter 2.2s steps(31, end) 0.2s forwards;
  }

  .rp-ascii {
    margin: 0 0 12px;
    padding: 0;
    border: none;
    background: transparent;
    font-size: 12px;
    line-height: 1.1;
    color: var(--rp-iris);
    overflow: hidden;
    animation: rp-glitch 7s infinite;
  }

  .rp-tagline-row {
    margin-bottom: 16px;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 8px;
    font-size: 12px;
    color: var(--rp-foam);
  }

  .rp-cursor {
    animation: rp-cursor 1s step-end infinite;
  }

  .rp-blog-link {
    margin-left: auto;
    color: var(--rp-iris);
    text-decoration: none;
  }

  .rp-blog-link:hover {
    opacity: 0.85;
  }

  .rp-grid {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(240px, 1fr));
    gap: 12px;
  }

  .rp-card {
    display: block;
    background: var(--rp-surface);
    border: 1px solid var(--rp-hl-med);
    border-radius: 8px;
    padding: 12px;
    text-decoration: none;
    opacity: 0;
    transform: translateY(16px);
    animation: rp-card-enter 0.45s ease forwards;
    animation-delay: calc(var(--i) * 0.1s);
    transition: background-color 0.2s ease, border-color 0.2s ease;
  }

  .rp-card:hover {
    background: var(--rp-overlay);
    border-color: var(--rp-iris);
  }

  .rp-card-head {
    display: flex;
    align-items: flex-start;
    justify-content: space-between;
    gap: 12px;
    margin-bottom: 8px;
  }

  .rp-card-title {
    margin: 0;
    font-size: 13px;
    font-weight: 500;
    line-height: 1.35;
    color: var(--rp-rose);
    transition: color 0.2s ease;
  }

  .rp-card:hover .rp-card-title {
    color: var(--rp-iris);
  }

  .rp-arrow {
    color: var(--rp-iris);
    opacity: 0;
    transform: translateX(-4px);
    transition: opacity 0.2s ease, transform 0.2s ease;
  }

  .rp-card:hover .rp-arrow {
    opacity: 1;
    transform: translateX(2px);
  }

  .rp-lang {
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    border-radius: 999px;
    border: 1px solid var(--rp-hl-med);
    background: var(--rp-hl-low);
    color: var(--rp-gold);
    font-size: 11px;
    line-height: 1.4;
    padding: 2px 8px;
  }

  .rp-desc {
    margin: 10px 0 0;
    color: var(--rp-subtle);
    font-size: 11px;
    line-height: 1.6;
  }

  .rp-tags {
    margin-top: 12px;
    display: flex;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
    gap: 6px;
  }

  .rp-tag {
    border-radius: 4px;
    border: 1px solid var(--rp-pine);
    background: var(--rp-hl-low);
    color: var(--rp-foam);
    font-size: 10px;
    line-height: 1.3;
    padding: 2px 6px;
  }

  .rp-status {
    margin-top: auto;
    padding-top: 12px;
    border-top: 1px solid var(--rp-hl-med);
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 12px;
    font-size: 11px;
  }

  .rp-status-left {
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 8px;
  }

  .rp-dot {
    width: 8px;
    height: 8px;
    border-radius: 999px;
    background: var(--rp-foam);
    animation: rp-pulse 2s infinite;
  }

  .rp-status-text {
    color: var(--rp-foam);
  }

  .rp-count {
    color: var(--rp-subtle);
  }

  .rp-github {
    margin-left: auto;
    color: var(--rp-iris);
    text-decoration: none;
  }

  .rp-github:hover {
    opacity: 0.85;
  }

  @keyframes rp-typewriter {
    from { width: 0; }
    to { width: 31ch; }
  }

  @keyframes rp-glitch {
    0%, 85%, 100% { text-shadow: none; }
    86% { text-shadow: 1px 0 var(--rp-iris), -1px 0 var(--rp-love); }
    87% { text-shadow: -1px 0 var(--rp-foam), 1px 0 var(--rp-love); }
    88% { text-shadow: 1px 0 var(--rp-foam), -1px 0 var(--rp-iris); }
  }

  @keyframes rp-cursor {
    0%, 49% { opacity: 1; }
    50%, 100% { opacity: 0; }
  }

  @keyframes rp-pulse {
    0%, 100% { opacity: 0.35; }
    50% { opacity: 1; }
  }

  @keyframes rp-card-enter {
    from {
      opacity: 0;
      transform: translateY(16px);
    }
    to {
      opacity: 1;
      transform: translateY(0);
    }
  }

  @media (max-width: 900px) {
    #quarto-content,
    main.content,
    .rp-home {
      height: auto;
      min-height: auto;
    }

    #quarto-content {
      overflow: visible;
    }

    .rp-shell {
      padding-top: 0;
    }
  }

  @media (max-width: 700px) {
    .rp-tagline-row {
      flex-wrap: wrap;
    }

    .rp-blog-link {
      margin-left: 0;
      width: 100%;
    }
  }

  @media (min-width: 901px) {
    html,
    body {
      overflow: hidden;
    }
  }
</style>
```
